strengths: 6+ years fullstack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple senior roles
Direct AI agent infrastructure experience including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks
Strong testing and software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, workshops on testing)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed in the resume
Limited demonstrated experience with Kotlin; Java exposure appears dated (robotic arms work 2016-2018)
Cloud platform experience narrow (AWS CDK only); no clear Kubernetes production work outside self-hosted GISCollective
response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned fullstack engineer with well-aligned TypeScript/Node/React experience, a strong testing culture, and recent hands-on work in AI agent tooling and MCP, which directly matches the role's internal automation and AI focus. Gaps exist around explicit Nest.js and Vitest usage, and Kotlin/Java depth is limited, but the breadth of languages and architecture experience suggests these are learnable. Overall the profile fits the stated stack and seniority expectations well.
